rules.description: List of BMAD agent rules enforced in the workspace.

id.description: The unique identifier of the rule, matching format R-XX (e.g., R-01).

title.description: A human-readable title of the rule.

agents.description: Standard BMAD agents that are in scope for this rule.

trigger.description: The scenario or lifecycle event that triggers agent evaluation of this rule.

instruction.description: The explicit, enforceable instruction the agent must comply with.

severity.description: Classification of failure to comply with the rule.
